title: Multi-Hop Delegation Evidence Transport
request: Alice delegates appointment coordination to Beth, and Beth delegates scheduling execution to a care agent.
notes: This scenario demonstrates delegation evidence transport only.
SOGA performs a single execution-time governance evaluation for the requested action.
Per-hop governance evaluation is future work. See B-020.

cmr.title: schedule cardiology appointment
cmr.objective: schedule a cardiology appointment for Alice

confirmed_authority: Alice delegates appointment coordination to Beth.
Beth delegates scheduling execution to the care agent.
The care agent may schedule appointments but may not authorize treatment, change medication, or access unrelated records.
